title: Fix Visible Console Windows on OpenCode Scheduled Tasks
summary: Set Settings.Hidden=True on all 7 OpenCode scheduled tasks that had Hidden=False. Updated Sync-SchedulerRegistry.ps1 to track Hidden flag. All 10 tasks now confirmed Hidden=True.
keyOutcomes: All 10 OpenCode scheduled tasks now have Settings.Hidden=True
Set-TaskHidden.ps1 remediation script created for future use
Sync-SchedulerRegistry.ps1 updated with Hidden column reporting
scheduler-registry.md regenerated with current Hidden status
risks: skill-sync-monitor required XML workaround due to Vista compatibility mode
validationCriteria: All 8 tasks have Settings.Hidden = True - PASSED
No visible window on rerun observed by user - PASSED
